seoTitle: Mystery Bay vs Myuna Bay — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mystery Bay and Myuna Bay. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mystery Bay vs Myuna Bay: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mystery Bay and Myuna Bay.
heading: Mystery Bay vs Myuna Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mystery Bay, New South Wales and Myuna Bay, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mystery Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Myuna Bay (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mystery Bay or Myuna Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mystery Bay has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Myuna Bay scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mystery Bay scores 48/100 for bushfire risk. Myuna Bay scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mystery Bay or Myuna Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mystery Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.6% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
